title: centaurium umbellatum var. majus
intro: Centaurium umbellatum var. majus, also known as the greater centaury, is a perennial plant species in the gentian family that is native to Europe. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Centaurium umbellatum var. majus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of tinctures, teas, and infusions, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to create remedies for various health conditions.
